response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with roughly 15 years of varied engineering experience, but the role demands Director-level individual contributor seniority with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms — the resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling and no evidence of strategic leadership, cloud/AI platform vision, or advising strategic customers at the scale required.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background spanning ~15 years
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with GISCollective showing product ownership and community engagement
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Senior IC level, not Director/Principal-level strategic leadership
Limited cloud platform depth and no evidence of advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
